name: The Slimegirl Experiment
description:
Down on your luck, you decide to undergo a really sketchy "Experimental procedure" for money

Getting fired is tough. Watching the days blur together without a single job offer for an entire month? Even tougher. But just when you thought you couldn't sink further, an opportunity arised. A supicious pamphlet made its way to your hands. It promised a generous monetary reward in exchange for one thing: your willing participation in a brand-new experimental procedure. With nothing to lose and bills piling high, you took the “job,” no questions asked.

a simple transformation bot, still getting the hang of writing stuff for this kind of medium. enjoy it! any suggestion or advise is greatly appreciated :3

next bot might actually be a character and not a setting/scenario!
creator: waterpillar_
